<script>
  (function () {
    try {
      // --------------- 이벤트 명 및 기본 세팅 ------------------
      var eventName = "h_add_payment_info";
      var PREF = "hurdlers_ga4";
      
      var imwebData = {{JS - Imweb Data Layer}};
      // -----------------------------------------------------

      // --------------- 이벤트 파라미터 영역 -----------------
      var eventParam = {};

      var orderInfo = getOrderInfo();
      
      eventParam[PREF] = {};
      eventParam["cid"] = getCookieValue("_ga");
      eventParam[PREF]["transaction_id"] = {{HURDLERS - 네이버페이 구매 아이디}};
      eventParam[PREF]["value"] = orderInfo.value;
      eventParam[PREF]["shipping"] = 0;
      eventParam[PREF]["currency"] = "KRW";
      eventParam[PREF]["items"] = orderInfo.items;
      eventParam[PREF]["utm_source"] = imwebData.utmSource;
      eventParam[PREF]["utm_medium"] = imwebData.utmMedium;
      eventParam[PREF]["utm_campaign"] = imwebData.utmCampaign;
      eventParam[PREF]["utm_content"] = imwebData.utmContent;
      eventParam[PREF]["utm_term"] = imwebData.utmTerm;
      eventParam[PREF]["member_code"] = imwebData.memberCode;
      // -----------------------------------------------------

      // ----------------- 이벤트 전송 --------------------------
      var itemCheck = window.sessionStorage.getItem(PREF);
      var currentItem = JSON.stringify(orderInfo.items);

      if (orderInfo.items.length > 0 && itemCheck !== currentItem) {
        HurdlersTracker.pushEvent(eventName, eventParam);
        window.sessionStorage.setItem(PREF, currentItem);
      }
      // -----------------------------------------------------
    } catch (error) {
      console.log(error);
    }

    // ------------------- 유틸리티 함수 --------------------------
    function getOrderInfo() {
      var purchaseItems = [];
      var revenue = getElementValueOrText(
        null,
        "._cart_main_total_price",
        "text",
        "num"
      ); // 총 상품가격

      var productContainer = customQuerySelector(".content", "all");
      var checkedProductList = [];

      productContainer.forEach(function (prd) {
        if (prd.querySelector("._cartItemCheckbox").checked) {
          checkedProductList.push(prd);
        }
      });

      checkedProductList.forEach(function (prd) {
        var name = getElementValueOrText(
          prd,
          ".cart-item-title",
          "text",
          "string"
        );
        var id = getElementValueOrText(prd, "a", "href", "string");
        var totalPrice = getElementValueOrText(prd, ".price", "text", "num");
        var quantity = getElementValueOrText(
          prd,
          ".amount > div",
          "text",
          "num"
        );
       
        var price = (totalPrice / quantity).toFixed(0);
        
        if(prd.querySelector(".opt")){
          var variantArr = prd.querySelector(".opt").innerText.replaceAll(prd.querySelector(".opt em").innerText, "").split("\n");
          
          variantArr.forEach(function(variant){
            purchaseItems.push({
              item_name: name,
              item_id: id,
              price: parseInt(price),
              quantity: parseInt(variant.split("-")[1].slice(1).replace(/\D/g, '')),
              item_brand: {{HURDLERS - 브랜드명}},
              item_varient : variant.split("-")[0].slice(0, -1)
            });
          })
        } else {
           purchaseItems.push({
            item_name: name,
            item_id: id,
            price: parseInt(price),
            quantity: parseInt(quantity),
            item_brand: {{HURDLERS - 브랜드명}},
          });
        }
      });

      return {
        items: purchaseItems,
        value: revenue,
      };
    }

    function getElementValueOrText(parent, selector, type, dataType) {
      var element = parent
        ? parent.querySelector(selector)
        : document.querySelector(selector);

      if (type === "value") {
        if (dataType === "num") {
          return parseInt(element.value.replace(/[^0-9]/g, ""));
        } else if (dataType === "string") {
          return element.value;
        }
      } else if (type === "text") {
        if (dataType === "num") {
          return parseInt(element.innerText.replace(/[^0-9]/g, ""));
        } else if (dataType === "string") {
          return element.innerText.trim();
        }
      } else if (type === "href") {
        if (dataType === "string") {
          return element.href.split("=")[1];
        }
      }

      return null; // 만약 유형(type)이나 데이터 유형(dataType)이 잘못된 경우 null을 반환
    }

    function customQuerySelector(selector, type, parent) {
      if (type === "all") {
        return document.querySelectorAll(selector);
      } else if (type === "one") {
        return document.querySelector(selector);
      } else {
        throw new Error("type was not founded");
      }
    }
    
    function getCookieValue(key) {
      var cookies = document.cookie.split(";");
      for (var i = 0; i < cookies.length; i++) {
        var cookie = cookies[i].trim();
        if (cookie.startsWith(key + "=")) {
          return cookie.substring(key.length + 1).substring(6);
        }
      }
      return null;
    }
  })();
</script>

      return checkoutItems;

      var element = parent
        ? parent.querySelector(selector)

      if (type === "value") {
        if (dataType === "num") {
          return parseInt(element.value.replace(/[^0-9]/g, ""));
        } else if (dataType === "string") {
          return element.value;
        }
      } else if (type === "text") {
        if (dataType === "num") {
          return parseInt(element.innerText.replace(/[^0-9]/g, ""));
        } else if (dataType === "string") {
          return element.innerText.trim();

      } else if (type === "href") {
        if (dataType === "string") {

    function customQuerySelector(selector, type) {
      if (type === "all") {

<script>
var hurdlersTracker = (function() {
  var instance;

  function createInstance() {
    var object = {};
    var debugMode = true;

    object.pushEvent = function(eventName, eventParams) {
      if (!eventName) {
        console.error('====== Event name is required. ======');
        return;
      }

      if (typeof dataLayer === 'undefined') {
        console.error('====== Data layer is not defined. ======');
        return;
      }

      var event = {
        'event': eventName
      };

      if (eventParams) {
        event = Object.assign(event, eventParams);
      }
      
      dataLayer.push(event);
      if (debugMode) {
        console.log("===============================");
        console.table(dataLayer[dataLayer.length - 1]);
        console.log("===============================");
      }
    };

    return object;
  }

  return {
    getInstance: function() {
      if (!instance) {
        instance = createInstance();
      }
      return instance;
    }
  };
})();

window.HurdlersTracker = hurdlersTracker.getInstance();
</script>

      }).reduce(function(a,b){
        return a + b;
      });
      eventParam[PREF]["currency"] = "KRW";
      // -----------------------------------------------------

      // ----------------- 이벤트 전송 --------------------------
      if (cartItems.length > 0) {
        HurdlersTracker.pushEvent(eventName, eventParam);
      }
      // -----------------------------------------------------
    } catch (error) {
      console.log(error);
    }
    // -------------------- 유틸리티 함수 ------------------------

    function getCartItems() {
      var cartItems = [];

      var optionCheck = customChildElementCount("#prod_options"); // 옵션 레이아웃 유무 확인
      var optionSelectedNum = customChildElementCount("#prod_selected_options"); // 옵션 갯수 확인
      var selectedItems = customQuerySelector(
        "#prod_selected_options .opt_block:not(.total)",
        "all"
      ); // 옵션이 포함된 선택된 상품 컨테이너

      //옵션 없을 경우
      if (!optionCheck) {
        var quantity = getElementValueOrText(
          null,
          "._order_count_mobile",
          "value",
          "num"
        );

        cartItems.push({
          item_name: window.hurdlers_ga4.product_name.replace(/</g, "<").replace(/>/g, ">"),
          item_id: window.hurdlers_ga4.product_id,
          price: window.hurdlers_ga4.product_price,
          quantity: quantity,
          item_brand: {{HURDLERS - 브랜드명}},
        });
        
      } else if (optionCheck && selectedItems.length > 0) {
        selectedItems.forEach(function (item) {
          var name = window.hurdlers_ga4.product_name;
          var id = window.hurdlers_ga4.product_id;
          var totalPrice = getElementValueOrText(
            item,
            ".area_price",
            "text",
            "num"
          );
          var quantity = getElementValueOrText(
            item,
            ".option_btn_tools > input",
            "value",
            "num"
          );

          var variant = getElementValueOrText(
            item,
            ".area_tit",
            "text",
            "string"
          );

          var price = totalPrice / quantity;

          cartItems.push({
            item_name: name.replace(/</g, "<").replace(/>/g, ">"),
            item_id: id,
            price: price,
            quantity: quantity,
            item_variant: variant,
            item_brand: {{HURDLERS - 브랜드명}},
          });

        });
      }

      return cartItems;
    }

    function getElementValueOrText(parent, selector, type, dataType) {
      var element = parent
        ? parent.querySelector(selector)
        : document.querySelector(selector);

      if (type === "value") {
        if (dataType === "num") {
          return parseInt(element.value.replace(/[^0-9]/g, ""));
        } else if (dataType === "string") {
          return element.value;
        }
      } else if (type === "text") {
        if (dataType === "num") {
          return parseInt(element.innerText.replace(/[^0-9]/g, ""));
        } else if (dataType === "string") {
          return element.innerText.trim().replace("구성: ", "");
        }
      }

      return null; // 만약 유형(type)이나 데이터 유형(dataType)이 잘못된 경우 null을 반환
    }

    function customQuerySelector(selector, type) {
      if (type === "all") {
        return document.querySelectorAll(selector);
      } else if (type === "one") {
        return document.querySelector(selector);
      } else {
        throw new Error("type was not founded");
      }
    }

    function customChildElementCount(selector) {
      return document.querySelector(selector).childElementCount;
    }
  })();
</script>

<script>
  (function () {
    try {
      // --------------- 이벤트 명 및 기본 세팅 ------------------
      var eventName = "h_completeRegistration";
      // -----------------------------------------------------

      // --------------- 이벤트 파라미터 영역 -----------------
      var method = window.localStorage.getItem("method");
      var eventParam = {
        method : method
      };
      // -----------------------------------------------------

      // ----------------- 이벤트 전송 --------------------------
      var data = window.dataLayer.filter(function(el){
        return el.event === "h_completeRegistration"
      })
      if (localStorage.getItem("completeRegistration") !== method && data.length < 1) {
        HurdlersTracker.pushEvent(eventName, eventParam);
        localStorage.setItem("completeRegistration", method);
      }
      // -----------------------------------------------------
    } catch (error) {
      console.log(error);
    }
  })();
</script>

const version = "0_2_01";

const log = require("logToConsole");
const copyFromWindow = require("copyFromWindow");
const copyFromDataLayer = require("copyFromDataLayer");
const makeNumber = require("makeNumber");
const callInWindow = require("callInWindow");
const Object = require("Object");
const JSON = require("JSON");

const ecommerce = copyFromDataLayer("ecommerce");
const eventModel = copyFromDataLayer("eventModel");
const userDataFromDataLayer = copyFromDataLayer("user_data");
const ttContents = copyFromDataLayer('tt_contents') || (eventModel && eventModel.tt_contents);
const ttContentType = copyFromDataLayer('tt_content_type') || (eventModel && eventModel.tt_content_type);
const ttExternalId = copyFromDataLayer('tt_external_id') || (eventModel && eventModel.tt_external_id);

const ValidEvents = {
  ViewContent: 1,
  ClickButton: 1,
  Search: 1,
  AddToWishlist: 1,
  AddToCart: 1,
  InitiateCheckout: 1,
  AddPaymentInfo: 1,
  CompletePayment: 1,
  PlaceAnOrder: 1,
  Contact: 1,
  Download: 1,
  SubmitForm: 1,
  CompleteRegistration: 1,
  Subscribe: 1,
};

const TTEventMap = {
  'add_payment_info': 'AddPaymentInfo',
  'add_to_cart': 'AddToCart',
  'add_to_wishlist': 'AddToWishlist',
  'begin_checkout': 'InitiateCheckout',
  'page_view': 'Pageview',
  'purchase': 'CompletePayment',
  'search': 'Search',
  'sign_up': 'CompleteRegistration',
  'view_item': 'ViewContent',
};

const checkExistence = (key) => {
  return typeof copyFromWindow(key) !== "undefined";
};

const looksLikeSHA256 = (s) => {
  return s && s.length == 64;
};

const getConfigHash = (data) => {
  // What API is used. 0: None, 1: Tag Manager, 2: Google Tag, 3: Both
  var apiVersion = 0;
  if (ecommerce || userDataFromDataLayer) apiVersion += 1;
  if (eventModel && (eventModel.items || eventModel.value || eventModel.currency || eventModel.user_data)) apiVersion += 2;

  var contents = 0;
  if (data.enhance_ecomm == false && data.single_multi_product == "empty") contents = 1;
  else if (data.enhance_ecomm == false && data.single_multi_product == "single") contents = 2;
  else if (data.enhance_ecomm == false && data.single_multi_product == "multiple") contents = 3;
  else if (data.enhance_ecomm == true && data.ga_ecomm == "enhance_ecomm") contents = 4;
  else if (data.enhance_ecomm == true && data.ga_ecomm == "ecomm") contents = 5;

  return '' + apiVersion + contents;
};

const getEnhancedEcommerceData = (data, ecommerce) => {
  if (!ecommerce) {
    return null;
  }

  if (data.event == "ViewContent" && ecommerce.detail && ecommerce.detail.products) {
    return ecommerce.detail.products;
  } else if (data.event == "AddToCart" && ecommerce.add && ecommerce.add.products) {
    return ecommerce.add.products;
  } else if ((data.event == "InitiateCheckout" || data.event == "AddPaymentInfo") && ecommerce.checkout && ecommerce.checkout.products) {
    return ecommerce.checkout.products;
  } else if ((data.event == "CompletePayment" || data.event == "PlaceAnOrder" || data.event == "Subscribe") && ecommerce.purchase && ecommerce.purchase.products) {
    return ecommerce.purchase.products;
  } else {
    if (ecommerce.detail && ecommerce.detail.products)
      return ecommerce.detail.products;
    if (ecommerce.add && ecommerce.add.products)
      return ecommerce.add.products;
    if (ecommerce.checkout && ecommerce.checkout.products)
      return ecommerce.checkout.products;
    if (ecommerce.purchase && ecommerce.purchase.products)
      return ecommerce.purchase.products;
  }
  return null;
};

const getItemCategories = (item) => {
  var categories = [];
  if (item.item_category) categories.push(item.item_category);
  if (item.item_category2) categories.push(item.item_category2);
  if (item.item_category3) categories.push(item.item_category3);
  if (item.item_category4) categories.push(item.item_category4);
  if (item.item_category5) categories.push(item.item_category5);

  if (categories.length > 0) {
    return categories.join(',');
  }

  return null;
};

const getEcommerceData = (data, ecommerce) => {
  var value = 0;
  var currency = "USD"; // default value
  var contents = [];

  /* 
    Standard Ecommerce Support. For more details on Ecommerce Data Structure
    https://developers.google.com/analytics/devguides/collection/ga4/ecommerce?client_type=gtm
    We will need to check for standard ecommerce events if Enhanced Ecommerce doesnt work
  */
  const secData = (ecommerce && ecommerce.items) || (eventModel && eventModel.items) || ttContents;
  if (secData) {
    log("1a. Standard Ecommerce - Data layers detected");
    secData.map(function (ed) {
      // Form the TikTok Parameter Object
      var content = {};
      if (ed.item_id) content.content_id = ed.item_id;
      if (!ed.item_id && ed.id) content.content_id = ed.id;
      if (ed.item_name) content.content_name = ed.item_name;
      if (ed.item_brand) content.brand = ed.item_brand;
      var categoryString = getItemCategories(ed);
      if (categoryString) content.content_category = categoryString;
      if (ed.price) content.price = makeNumber(ed.price);
      if (ed.quantity) {
        content.quantity = makeNumber(ed.quantity);
      } else {
        content.quantity = 1;
      }
      content.content_type = ttContentType || "product";
      contents.push(content);
      // Calulate the total value shown
      if (ed.price) {
        if (!ed.quantity) ed.quantity = 1;
        value += ed.price * ed.quantity;
      }
    });
  } else if (data.ga_ecomm == "ecomm") {
    log("1a. Standard Ecommerce - Unable to detect any Data Layers");
  }

  /* 
    Enhanced Ecommerce Support. Fore more details on Enhanced Ecommerce Data Structure
    https://developers.google.com/analytics/devguides/collection/ua/gtm/enhanced-ecommerce#details
    ViewContent = detail
    AddToCart = add
    InitiateCheckout, AddPaymentInfo = checkout
    CompletePayment, PlaceAnOrder, Subscribe = purchase
  */
  const eecData = getEnhancedEcommerceData(data, ecommerce);
  if (eecData !== null && contents.length == 0) {
    log("1b. Enhanced Ecommerce - Data layers detected");
    eecData.map(function (ed) {
      // Form the TikTok Parameter Object
      var content = {};
      if (ed.id) content.content_id = ed.id;
      if (ed.name) content.content_name = ed.name;
      if (ed.brand) content.brand = ed.brand;
      if (ed.category) content.content_category = ed.category;
      if (ed.price) content.price = makeNumber(ed.price);
      if (ed.quantity) {
        content.quantity = makeNumber(ed.quantity);
      } else {
        content.quantity = 1;
      }
      content.content_type = ttContentType || "product";
      contents.push(content);
      // Calulate the total value shown
      if (ed.price) {
        if (!ed.quantity) ed.quantity = 1;
        value += ed.price * ed.quantity;
      }
    });
  } else if (data.ga_ecomm == "enhance_ecomm") {
    log("1b. Enhanced Ecommerce - Unable to detect any ecommerce data layers");
  }

  if (data.ecomm_currency)
    currency = data.ecomm_currency;
  else if (ecommerce && ecommerce.currencyCode)
    currency = ecommerce.currencyCode;
  else if (ecommerce && ecommerce.currency)
    currency = ecommerce.currency;
  else if (eventModel && eventModel.currency)
    currency = eventModel.currency;

  if (ecommerce && ecommerce.value) {
    value = ecommerce.value;
  } else if (
    ecommerce &&
    ecommerce.purchase &&
    ecommerce.purchase.actionField &&
    ecommerce.purchase.actionField.revenue
  ) {
    value = ecommerce.purchase.actionField.revenue;
  } else if (eventModel && eventModel.value) {
    value = eventModel.value;
  }

  return {
    value: value,
    currency: currency,
    contents: contents
  };
};

const isHashed = (val) => {
  return val && val.match("^[A-Fa-f0-9]{64}$") != null;
};

const getUserDataFromDataLayer = () => {
  var userData = {};
  const email = (userDataFromDataLayer && (userDataFromDataLayer.email_address || userDataFromDataLayer.sha256_email_address)) ||
    (eventModel && eventModel.user_data && (eventModel.user_data.email_address || eventModel.user_data.sha256_email_address));
  if (email) {
    if (isHashed(email)) {
      userData.sha256_email = email;
    } else {
      userData.email = email;
    }
  }

  const phone = (userDataFromDataLayer && (userDataFromDataLayer.phone_number || userDataFromDataLayer.sha256_phone_number)) ||
    (eventModel && eventModel.user_data && (eventModel.user_data.phone_number || eventModel.user_data.sha256_phone_number));
  if (phone) {
    if (isHashed(phone)) {
      userData.sha256_phone_number = phone;
    } else {
      userData.phone_number = phone;
    }
  }

  if (ttExternalId) {
    userData.external_id = ttExternalId;
  }

  return userData;
};

const main = () => {
  // Forming the passed in parameters
  var parameters = {
    gtm_version: version + ':' + getConfigHash(data),
    event_trigger_source: 'GoogleTagManagerClient',
  };
  const ttEvent = TTEventMap[data.event] || data.event;

  // Check if enhance ecomm is enabled.
  if (data.enhance_ecomm == true) {
    const ecomData = getEcommerceData(data, ecommerce);
    parameters.currency = ecomData.currency;
    parameters.value = ecomData.value;
    if (ecomData.contents && ecomData.contents.length > 0) {
      parameters.contents = ecomData.contents;
    }
  } else {
    if (data.single_multi_product == "single") {
      // Single Content
      if (data.content_id) parameters.content_id = data.content_id;
      if (data.content_type || ttContentType) parameters.content_type = data.content_type || ttContentType;
      if (data.content_name) parameters.content_name = data.content_name;
      if (data.price) parameters.price = makeNumber(data.price);
      if (data.quantity) parameters.quantity = makeNumber(data.quantity);
      if (data.currency) parameters.currency = data.currency;
      if (data.value) {
        parameters.value = makeNumber(data.value);
      } else {
        if (data.price && data.quantity) {
          parameters.value = makeNumber(data.price) * makeNumber(data.quantity);
        }
      }
      if (data.content_category)
        parameters.content_category = data.content_category;
      if (data.description) parameters.description = data.description;
      if (data.query) parameters.query = data.query;
      if (data.status) parameters.status = data.status;
    } else if (data.single_multi_product == "multiple") {
      // Multiple Content
      if (data.contents) {
        const parsedContents = JSON.parse(data.contents);
        if (parsedContents !== undefined) {
          parameters.contents = parsedContents;
        } else {
          parameters.contents = data.contents;
        }
      }
      if (data.currency) parameters.currency = data.currency;
      if (data.value) parameters.value = makeNumber(data.value);
      if (data.description) parameters.description = data.description;
      if (data.query) parameters.query = data.query;
      if (data.status) parameters.status = data.status;
    } else if (data.single_multi_product == "empty") {
      // No Content
      if (data.currency) parameters.currency = data.currency;
      if (data.value) parameters.value = makeNumber(data.value);
      if (data.description) parameters.description = data.description;
      if (data.query) parameters.query = data.query;
      if (data.status) parameters.status = data.status;
    }
  }

  // Additional Object Properties
  if (data.custom_properties && data.custom_properties.length > 0) {
    for (let i = 0; i < data.custom_properties.length; i++) {
      let objectParam = data.custom_properties[i];
      if (objectParam.key) {
        parameters[objectParam.key] = objectParam.value;
      }
    }
  }

  // Advanced Matching and sending TT events
  var userData = getUserDataFromDataLayer();

  if (data.hash == "hashed") {
    // Send hashed data
    if (data.sha256_email) userData.sha256_email = data.sha256_email;
    if (data.sha256_phone)
      userData.sha256_phone_number = data.sha256_phone;
    // Note: The key is still "external_id"
    if (data.sha256_external_id)
      userData.external_id = data.sha256_external_id;
    log("2a. Advanced matching with hashed PII");
  } else if (data.hash == "non-hashed") {
    // Send non-hashed data and TikTok Pixel will hash it for you.
    if (data.email) userData.email = data.email;
    if (data.phone) userData.phone_number = data.phone;
    if (data.external_id) userData.external_id = data.external_id;
    log(
      "2b. Advanced matching without hashed data, TikTok Pixel will hash the data for you."
    );
  }

  if (Object.keys(userData).length > 0) {
    callInWindow("ttq.identify", userData);
  }

  log(
    "3. Base code found, sending ",
    ttEvent,
    "event with",
    parameters,
    data.event_id
  );

  if (data.pixel_code) {
    callInWindow("ttq.track", ttEvent, parameters, {
      event_id: data.event_id,
      pixel_code: data.pixel_code
    });
  } else {
    callInWindow("ttq.track", ttEvent, parameters, {
      event_id: data.event_id
    });
  }
};

const validate = (data) => {
  const errors = [];
  const warnings = [];

  // errors
  if (!checkExistence("ttq")) {
    errors.push("ttq not found");
  }

  // clean up
  if (data.external_id) {
    data.external_id = data.external_id.trim();
  }

  // warnings
  // 1. Prevent user from passing in SHA256 hash as "email" or "phone" to avoid double-hashing.
  // 2. Prevent user from passing in non-hash as "sha256_email" or "sha256_phone".
  if (data.email) {
    if (data.email.indexOf("@") === -1)
      warnings.push("data.email is not an email");
    if (looksLikeSHA256(data.email))
      warnings.push("data.email appears to be a SHA256 hash");
  }
  if (data.phone) {
    if (looksLikeSHA256(data.phone))
      warnings.push("data.phone appears to be a SHA256 hash");
  }
  if (data.sha256_email) {
    if (!looksLikeSHA256(data.sha256_email))
      warnings.push("data.sha256_email is not a SHA256 hash");
  }
  if (data.sha256_phone) {
    if (!looksLikeSHA256(data.sha256_phone))
      warnings.push("data.sha256_phone is not a SHA256 hash");
  }

  if (TTEventMap[data.event] == undefined && ValidEvents[data.event] === undefined) {
    warnings.push('data.event "' + data.event + '" is not a valid event');
  }

  for (const msg of warnings) {
    log("[WARN] " + msg);
  }
  for (const msg of errors) {
    log("[ERROR] " + msg);
  }
  return errors;
};

const start = () => {
  const errors = validate(data);
  if (errors.length > 0) {
    data.gtmOnFailure();
    return;
  }

  main();

  data.gtmOnSuccess();
};

start();

<!-- HURDLE 향상된 전자상거래 네이버페이 구매 ( IN CART PAGE ) -->
<script>
    (function(){
        var products = [];
        var product_all = document.querySelectorAll('.content');
        var product_checked = [];

        // Check 된 것만 가져오기
        for (var i = 0; i < product_all.length; i++) {
            var temp = window.getComputedStyle(product_all[i].querySelector('span'), '::before').getPropertyValue('background').indexOf('101');
            if (temp > 0) {
                product_checked.push(product_all[i]);
            }
        }

        for (var j = 0; j < product_checked.length; j++) {
            var name = product_checked[j].querySelector('.cart-item-title').innerText,
                id = product_checked[j].querySelector('a').href.split('=')[1],
                price = product_checked[j].querySelector('.price').innerText.split('원')[0].replace(/[^0-9]/g, ''),
                quantity = product_checked[j].querySelector('.amount > div ').innerText,
                variant = product_checked[j].querySelector('.cart-item-title').innerText;
          
            if (quantity.indexOf('총') > 0) {
              
                quantity = product_checked[j].querySelector('.amount > div ').innerText.split(' ')[1].split('개')[0];
            } else {
              
                quantity = product_checked[j].querySelector('.amount > div ').innerText.split('개')[0];
            }
        
            quantity = parseInt(quantity);         
            price = parseInt(price) / quantity;
            price = price.toFixed(0);
          
            products.push({
                'item_name': name,
                'item_id': id,
                'price': price + '',
                'quantity': quantity,
                'item_brand': {{HURDLERS - 브랜드명}},
                'item_variant': variant,
            });
        }
      
        // 상품정보 없을 시
        if (products.length == 0) {
          
            return;
        }

        var revenue = 0;
      
        // 총 상품가격 
        revenue = document.querySelector('._cart_main_total_price').innerText.split('원')[0].replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
 
        if (revenue == 0) {
          
            return;
        }

        var item_check = sessionStorage.getItem('HURDLE_items');
        var current_item = JSON.stringify(products);

        if (item_check !== current_item && products.length > 0) {

          sessionStorage.setItem('HURDLE_items', current_item);
          
          console.log(current_item);
          console.log(revenue);
          console.log({{HURDLERS - 네이버페이 구매 아이디}});
          
          window.dataLayer.push({
                'event': 'ga4_purchase',
                'hurdlers_ga4': {
                  'transaction_id': {{HURDLERS - 네이버페이 구매 아이디}},
                  'affiliation': {{HURDLERS - 브랜드명}},
                  'value': revenue + '',
                  'shipping': '0',
                  'currency': 'KRW',
                  'items': products
                }
          });
      }
  })()
</script>

<!-- HURDLE Checkout EVENT -->
<script>
  window.addEventListener("load", function(event) {
        var products = [];

        checkout_products.forEach(function (checkout_product) {
            console.log(checkout_product);
            var name = checkout_product.querySelector('.shop_item_title').innerText,
                id = checkout_product.querySelector('a').href.split('=')[1],
                price = parseInt(checkout_product.querySelector('.shop_item_pay > span').innerText.replace(/[^0-9]/g, "")),
                quantity = parseInt(/[0-9][개]/.exec(checkout_product.querySelector('.shop_item_opt').innerText)),
        
            price = price / quantity;
          
            products.push({
                'item_name': name,
                'item_id': id,
                'price': price + '',
                'quantity': quantity,
                'item_brand': {{HURDLERS - 브랜드명}}
            });
        });
    
        if (products.length > 0) {
            dataLayer.push({
                'event': 'begin_checkout',
                'hurdlers_ga4': {
                    'items' : products,
                    'currency' : 'KRW'

            });
            sessionStorage.setItem('HURDLE_items', JSON.stringify(products));
        }
  });
</script>

<!-- HURDLE 향상된 네이버 페이 구매  In DetailPageView  -->

<script>
    (function(){
        var products = [];
        var option_check = document.querySelector('#prod_options').childElementCount;
        var option_selected_products = document.querySelector('#prod_selected_options').querySelectorAll('.opt_block:not(.total)');
        var option_selected_num = document.querySelector('#prod_selected_options').childElementCount;
      
        //옵션 없을 경우 
        if (!option_check) {
    
            var quantity = parseInt(document.querySelector('._order_count_mobile').value);
    
            products.push({
              'item_name': window.hurdlers_ga4.product_name,
              'item_id': window.hurdlers_ga4.product_id,
              'price': window.hurdlers_ga4.product_price,
              'quantity': quantity,
              'item_brand': {{HURDLERS - 브랜드명}},
            });
        }
    
        // 옵션 있는 경우 + 옵션 선택한 경우 
        if (option_check && option_selected_num > 0) {
    
            var option_products = document.querySelector('#prod_selected_options').querySelectorAll('.opt_block:not(.total)');
    
            for (i = 0; i < option_products.length; i++) {
                
                var name = window.hurdlers_ga4.product_name,
                    id = window.hurdlers_ga4.product_id,
                    price = option_products[i].querySelector('.area_price').innerText.replace(/[^0-9]/g,''),
                    quantity = option_products[i].querySelector('.option_btn_tools > input').value,
                    variant = option_products[i].querySelector('.area_tit').innerText;
              
                price = price / quantity;        
              
                products.push({
                  'item_name': name,
                  'item_id': id,
                  'price': price,
                  'quantity': quantity,
                  'item_brand': {{HURDLERS - 브랜드명}},
                });
            }
        }
      
        // 상품정보 없을시 
        if (products.length == 0) {
           
            return;
        }
      
        var revenue = 0;
      
        // 총 구매가격
        for (i = 0; i < products.length; i++) {
        
            revenue += products[i].quantity * parseInt(products[i].price);
        }

        if (revenue == 0) {
         
            return;
        }

        var item_check = sessionStorage.getItem('HURDLE_items');
        var current_item = JSON.stringify(products);

        if (item_check !== current_item && products.length > 0) {

          sessionStorage.setItem('HURDLE_items', current_item);
          console.log(current_item);
          console.log(revenue);
          console.log({{HURDLERS - 네이버페이 구매 아이디}});
          
          window.dataLayer.push({
                'event': 'ga4_purchase',
                'hurdlers_ga4': {
                  'transaction_id': {{HURDLERS - 네이버페이 구매 아이디}},
                  'affiliation': {{HURDLERS - 브랜드명}},
                  'value': revenue + '',
                  'shipping': '0',
                  'currency': 'KRW',
                  'items': products
                }
          });
        }
    })()
  
</script>
